# dryAPI

## Docs

- [Audio-to-Text (X Spaces Transcription)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/audio-to-text-spaces.md): Endpoint for requesting audio transcription (Twitter Spaces)
- [Audio-to-Text (X Spaces) Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/audio-to-text-spaces-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for audio to text inference (Twitter Spaces)
- [Image-to-Text (OCR)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/image-to-text.md): Endpoint for requesting image2text (OCR) inference
- [Image-to-Text Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/image-to-text-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for image2text (OCR) inference
- [Upload Audio File (Audio-to-Text)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/upload-audio-file.md): Endpoint for requesting audio transcription
- [Upload Audio File Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/upload-audio-file-price.md): Endpoint for requesting audio transcription price
- [Upload Video File (Video-to-Text)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/upload-video-file.md): Endpoint for requesting video transcription
- [Upload Video File Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/upload-video-file-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for video to text inference
- [Video-to-Text (Transcription)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/video-to-text.md): Unique Platform Support: dryAPI is one of the few APIs offering direct transcription from YT, TikTok, Twitch VODs, X and Kick videos — no need to download files first. Just paste the URL.
- [Video-to-Text Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/analysis/video-to-text-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for video to text inference
- [Errors](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/errors.md): HTTP status codes and error responses returned by dryAPI
- [Audio-to-Video](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/audio-to-video.md): Endpoint for requesting audio2video inference
- [Audio-to-Video Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/audio-to-video-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for audio2video inference
- [Image-to-Video](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/image-to-video.md): Endpoint for requesting image2video inference
- [Image-to-Video Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/image-to-video-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for image2video inference
- [Text-to-Embedding](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-embedding.md): Endpoint for requesting text to embedding inference
- [Text-to-Embedding Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-embedding-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for text to embedding inference
- [Text-to-Image](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-image.md): Endpoint for requesting text2img inference
- [Text-to-Image Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-image-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for text2img inference
- [Text-to-Music](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-music.md): Endpoint for requesting text2music inference
- [Text-to-Music Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-music-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for text2music inference. Requires duration and inference_steps parameters.
- [Text-to-Speech (TTS)](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-speech.md): Endpoint for requesting text2audio inference
- [Text-to-Speech Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-speech-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for text2audio inference. Either text or count_text must be provided.
- [Text-to-Video](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-video.md): Endpoint for requesting text2video inference
- [Text-to-Video Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/generation/text-to-video-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for text2video inference
- [API Overview](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/overview.md): Complete reference of all dryAPI endpoints
- [Image Prompt Booster](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/image-prompt-booster.md): Enhance text-to-image prompts for better AI generation results.
- [Image Prompt Booster Price](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/image-prompt-booster-price.md): Calculate the cost of enhancing a text-to-image prompt before execution.
- [Image-to-Image Prompt Booster](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/image-to-image-prompt-booster.md): Enhance image-to-image transformation prompts with visual context awareness. Requires a reference image.
- [Image-to-Image Prompt Booster Price](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/image-to-image-prompt-booster-price.md): Calculate the cost of enhancing an image-to-image transformation prompt before execution.
- [Prompt Enhancement](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/overview.md): AI-powered prompt optimization tools that transform basic ideas into detailed, professional prompts for better generation results.
- [Sample Prompts Generator](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/sample-prompts.md): Generate creative sample prompts for AI inference tasks. Perfect for inspiration, testing, or quick starting points.
- [Sample Prompts Price](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/sample-prompts-price.md): Calculate the cost of generating sample prompts before execution.
- [Speech Prompt Booster](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/speech-prompt-booster.md): Enhance text-to-speech input for more natural, expressive audio generation.
- [Speech Prompt Booster Price](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/speech-prompt-booster-price.md): Calculate the cost of enhancing a text-to-speech prompt before execution.
- [Video Prompt Booster](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/video-prompt-booster.md): Enhance text-to-video or image-to-video prompts. Optionally include a reference image for context-aware enhancement.
- [Video Prompt Booster Price](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/prompt-enhancement/video-prompt-booster-price.md): Calculate the cost of enhancing a video prompt before execution.
- [Image Background Removal](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/background-removal.md): Endpoint for requesting image background removal inference
- [Image Background Removal Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/background-removal-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for image background removal inference
- [Image-to-Image](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/image-to-image.md): Endpoint for requesting img2img inference. Accepts either a single image via "image" or multiple images via "images[]" (mutually exclusive).
- [Image-to-Image Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/image-to-image-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for img2img inference
- [Image Upscale](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/image-upscale.md): Endpoint for requesting image upscaling inference
- [Image Upscale Price Calculation](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/transformation/image-upscale-price.md): Endpoint for calculating price for image upscaling inference
- [Check Balance](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/utilities/check-balance.md): Endpoint for requesting client current balance.
- [Get Results](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/utilities/get-results.md): Check job status and retrieve results via polling
- [Model Selection](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/api/utilities/model-selection.md): Endpoint for fetching all available models.
- [Architecture & Security](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/architecture-and-security.md)
- [Execution Modes & HTTP Queue](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/execution-modes-and-http-queue.md): How to receive job results via webhooks, WebSockets, or polling
- [MCP Server](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/mcp-server.md): Describes the dryAPI MCP server, its available tools, and how to connect agents or IDE integrations to use dryAPI as a structured toolbox.
- [n8n dryAPI node](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/n8n-deapi-node.md)
- [n8n Integration](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/n8n-integration.md)
- [Webhooks](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/webhooks.md): Receive real-time notifications about job status changes
- [WebSockets](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/execution-modes-and-integrations/websockets.md): Receive real-time job status updates via WebSocket connections
- [Introduction](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/introduction.md): Fast and affordable inference for open-source AI models
- [Limits & Quotas](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/limits-and-quotas.md)
- [Models](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/models.md): How to discover, select, and use models on dryAPI
- [FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/other/faq-frequently-asked-questions.md)
- [Payment Methods](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/other/payment-methods.md)
- [SDKs & Integrations](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/other/sdks-and-integrations.md)
- [Support & Contact](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/other/support-and-contact.md)
- [Pricing](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/pricing.md)
- [Quickstart](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/quickstart.md)

## OpenAPI Specs

- [openapi](https://dryapi.dev/docs/v1/openapi.json)


Built with [Mintlify](https://mintlify.com).
